title: AWeber vs Sendinblue (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare AWeber and Sendinblue email marketing tools. See pricing, features, and which platform suits your needs best.
intro: AWeber and Sendinblue (now Brevo) are both established email marketing platforms with freemium models, but they target different use cases. AWeber focuses on simplicity for bloggers and solopreneurs, while Sendinblue offers a comprehensive CRM suite with SMS and transactional capabilities. This comparison helps you determine which platform aligns best with your marketing goals.

comparison_table.tool_a: Autoresponders, landing pages, RSS-to-email, AMP emails
comparison_table.tool_b: SMS, WhatsApp, CRM, transactional API, chat

choose_a_if: You're a blogger or solopreneur looking for an easy-to-use email platform with a gentle learning curve
You want RSS-to-email automation and landing page builders integrated into your email tool
You need AMP for email capabilities to create interactive email content
choose_b_if: You need multi-channel marketing including SMS, WhatsApp, and chat alongside email
You want a comprehensive CRM system with transactional email API capabilities
You require a much larger free tier or plan to scale significantly with advanced features

faq.a: Neither is universally 'better'—it depends on your needs. AWeber excels for simple email marketing and content creators, while Sendinblue is superior if you need multi-channel marketing (SMS, WhatsApp), CRM features, and transactional capabilities. Sendinblue rates higher overall on G2 and Trustpilot, but AWeber's simplicity makes it the better choice for beginners unfamiliar with marketing automation.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, AWeber or Sendinblue?
faq.a: Sendinblue offers a more generous free tier with 100,000 subscribers and 300 daily emails, compared to AWeber's 500-subscriber limit. However, AWeber's paid plans start at $15/month versus Sendinblue's $25/month. For long-term use at scale, total cost depends on your subscriber count and feature needs.

faq.q: Can I switch from Sendinblue to AWeber?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support subscriber list imports and exports in standard formats like CSV. Most email marketing tools allow you to export your contacts and import them into a new platform. Migration typically takes a few hours, though you may need to rebuild automation workflows and template designs manually in the new system.
